query: A floral summer long sleeve dress, feminine and bohemian

payload.description: This is a multicolor (colorful, multi-colored, patterned) long sleeve dress. The style is bohemian (boho, free-spirited, artistic) with a floral (flower pattern, botanical print) pattern. Made of velvet (plush, luxurious, soft) with a baggy (very loose, oversized, roomy). Designed for women's (female, feminine) — baby (infant, newborn, 0-2 years), child (kids, children, 3-12 years), teenager (teen, adolescent, 13-17 years), young adult (young, 18-29 years). Suitable for winter (cold weather, warm clothing) and travel (comfortable, versatile, journey). Brand: Zimmermann. Price: €196.00 (mid-range). Features: turtleneck (high neck, roll neck, polo neck), bishop sleeves (full, gathered-at-cuff sleeves), knotted hem (tied-up, front-knot hem), maxi dress (long, floor-length, flowing), knee-length (at the knee), low-rise waist (low waist, hip-hugger).
